items.description: Every creative is optimized for conversions. We think in terms of revenue, not vanity metrics.

testimonials.quote: We went from 1.8x to 4.2x ROAS in the first month. The difference was night and day.
testimonials.author: Sarah Chen

testimonials.quote: CAC: dropped 31% while conversion rate improved 23%. That is the kind of performance we needed.

testimonials.quote: CPM down 38%, CTR up 47. Finally, an agency that understands efficiency.

sections.headline: See Your Custom Winning Strategy
sections.description: A free 30-minute audit to identify your biggest opportunity for growth.
sections.subtext: No credit card required. Results guaranteed.

faqs.question: What is the typical turnaround time?
faqs.answer: 5 business days from brief to delivery. We prioritize speed without sacrificing quality.

faqs.question: Is there a long-term commitment?
faqs.answer: Nope. Start with a single sprint. If you love the results (and you will), we can scale from there.

faqs.question: How do you report performance?
faqs.answer: Weekly reports with ROAS, CAC, CTR, conversion rate, and specific creative metrics. Plain English matters. We send weekly reports—no fluff, just numbers.
